applicationIds.label: Application IDs
applicationIds.description: Comma separated list of project IDs, if empty, all applications will be in the list

serviceIds.label: Service ID
serviceIds.description: Comma separated list of service IDs, if empty, all services will be in the list

personalAccessToken.label: Personal Access Token With Write Access
personalAccessToken.description: Personal Access Token With Write Access to Redploy and Restart Projects
